summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Language Toggle and Dashboard Live Data features. All tests passed - Language switch works system-wide (RTL/LTR), persists after refresh and across navigation, and Admin Dashboard displays live data from /api/dashboard/stats correctly.
passed_tests: Browser title displays 'NASSAQ | نَسَّق'
Landing page loads in Arabic (RTL) by default
Language toggle on Landing Page works (Arabic RTL ↔ English LTR)
Language persists in localStorage under 'nassaq_language' key
Language persists after page refresh
Language persists across page navigation (Landing → Login → Register → Landing)
Login page supports both languages (Arabic/English)
Login page language toggle works correctly
Register page supports both languages (Arabic/English)
Register page language toggle works correctly
Admin Dashboard loads with live data from /api/dashboard/stats
Global Analytics shows: 7 total_schools, 3 total_students, 4 total_teachers, 5 active_users, 0 active_schools, 6 pending_requests
Daily Platform Activity shows: 3 total_classes, 4 total_subjects, 4 total_teachers, 3 total_students
Admin Dashboard language toggle works (Globe button)
All text changes when language is toggled (headers, buttons, content)
API: Admin login successful with valid credentials
API: Admin login rejected with invalid credentials
API: Dashboard stats requires authentication
API: Dashboard stats returns all expected fields
API: Schools list endpoint works
API: Teachers list endpoint works
API: Students list endpoint works
API: Classes list endpoint works
API: Subjects list endpoint works
API: Registration requests endpoint works
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Dashboard Globe button for language toggle should have data-testid='language-toggle' for consistent testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All language toggle and dashboard features working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language toggle feature is fully functional. ThemeContext.js handles language state with localStorage persistence under 'nassaq_language' key. The applyLanguageDirection() function updates HTML/body dir attributes and CSS custom properties. Admin Dashboard fetches live data from /api/dashboard/stats which returns: total_schools, total_students, total_teachers, active_schools, pending_schools, total_users, pending_requests, active_users, total_classes, total_subjects. All pages (Landing, Login, Register, Admin Dashboard) support bilingual content (Arabic/English) with proper RTL/LTR switching.
